name: System
description: Master boot controller for the ROOT_SYSTEM

scripts.boot:mac: node auto-ip.js && concurrently -c "green,blue" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start"
scripts.boot:win: node auto-ip.js && concurrently -c "green,blue" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd System-Backend && venv\Scripts\activate && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start"
scripts.boot:simple: node auto-ip.js && concurrently -c "green,blue" -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "cd System-Backend && python main.py" "cd System-Frontend && npx expo start"
